checks.name: release workflow exists
checks.remediation: Keep the release workflow under version control.

checks.name: workflow permission: contents:read
checks.remediation: Set `contents: read` in the release job permissions; it is needed to read source.

checks.name: workflow permission: packages:write
checks.remediation: Set `packages: write` in the release job permissions; it is needed to push the container image.

checks.name: workflow permission: id-token:write
checks.remediation: Set `id-token: write` in the release job permissions; it is needed to request OIDC identity for keyless signing.

checks.name: workflow permission: attestations:write
checks.remediation: Set `attestations: write` in the release job permissions; it is needed to publish GitHub attestations.

checks.name: build image with Buildx
checks.remediation: Use docker/build-push-action so the workflow exposes the pushed digest.

checks.name: export immutable digest
checks.remediation: Store the digest and verify the digest reference, not a mutable tag.

checks.name: generate SPDX SBOM
checks.remediation: Generate an SBOM during the release workflow.

checks.name: attest build provenance
checks.remediation: Add GitHub's provenance attestation action.

checks.name: attest SBOM
checks.remediation: Add an SBOM attestation bound to the image digest.

checks.name: cosign keyless signing
checks.remediation: Sign the pushed digest with Cosign keyless signing.

checks.name: local policy verification
checks.remediation: Call the verification script from CI so failures are visible immediately.

checks.name: negative deny example
checks.remediation: Demonstrate that the policy rejects the wrong workflow identity.

checks.name: digest-only gate
checks.remediation: Reject image references that are not immutable digest references.

checks.name: cosign verify
checks.remediation: Verify the keyless signature.

checks.name: expected identity
checks.remediation: Bind the signature to the expected GitHub workflow identity.

checks.name: OIDC issuer
checks.remediation: Require GitHub's Actions OIDC issuer.

checks.name: provenance verification
checks.evidence: Token `gh attestation verify` found in scripts/verify-image.sh
checks.remediation: Verify GitHub artifact attestations.

checks.name: SBOM predicate
checks.remediation: Require an SPDX SBOM attestation.

checks.name: pinned Python dependencies
checks.remediation: Pin direct dependencies with == and use Dependabot/dependency review for controlled updates.

checks.name: Dockerfile exists
checks.remediation: Keep it minimal and reproducible.

checks.name: non-root container user
checks.remediation: Run the application as a non-root user in the final image.

checks.name: container healthcheck
checks.remediation: Add a simple health check so deployment failures are visible.

checks.name: base image digest pinning
checks.remediation: For stronger reproducibility, pin the base image by digest after selecting the final base.

checks.name: dependency review workflow
checks.remediation: Add a pull-request dependency review workflow.

checks.name: Dependabot updates
checks.remediation: Enable Dependabot for GitHub Actions and package managers.

checks.name: policy file
checks.remediation: Keep expected repository/workflow/ref in a small policy file.

checks.name: threat model
checks.remediation: Document what the pipeline does and does not prove.

checks.name: user guide
checks.remediation: Add simple copy-paste verification instructions.
